metrics.name: context_precision
metrics.description: Measures whether the retrieved chunks are relevant and ranked high for the user question.

metrics.name: context_recall
metrics.description: Measures whether the retrieved contexts contain the information needed to answer the question.

metrics.name: faithfulness
metrics.description: Measures whether the generated answer is factually supported by the retrieved context.

metrics.name: answer_relevance
metrics.description: Measures whether the generated answer directly answers the user question.

notes.context_recall: Useful for checking whether important evidence was retrieved.
notes.answer_relevance: Useful for checking whether the answer addresses the question.
